home.heroSubtitle: Generate CSS clamp() values, convert units, and preview your typography in real-time. Free tool for developers who care about responsive design.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three powerful tools in one place. Here's how to get the most out of them.
home.step1Desc: Convert between px, rem, em, pt, vh, and vw instantly. Set your base font size for accurate rem/em calculations.
home.step2Desc: Generate fluid typography with CSS clamp(). Define your viewport range and font sizes, get the perfect formula.
home.step3Desc: See your typography in action with real Google Fonts. Test how your clamp() values behave across different screen sizes.
home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about CSS clamp() and responsive typography.
home.blogTeaserSubtitle: Dive deeper into responsive design best practices with our guides.
step2Features: Min/Max font size with unit selector

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question, found a bug, or want to suggest a feature? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.emailDesc: The fastest way to reach us. We typically respond within 1-2 business days.
contact.whatToInclude: What to Include in Your Message
contact.whatToIncludeDesc: To help us assist you better, please include:
contact.bugReports: Bug reports: Steps to reproduce, browser/version, and screenshots if possible
contact.featureRequests: Feature requests: Describe the problem you're trying to solve
contact.generalQuestions: General questions: Be as specific as you can about what you need
contact.checkFAQ: Check our Frequently Asked Questions section. Your question might already be answered there!

island.title: Typography Tool
island.subtitle: Convert units, generate clamp(), and preview in real-time

viewportPreview.title: Live Preview
viewportPreview.note: Note: The vw unit is relative to your browser viewport. For accurate responsive testing, use this preview to check typography appearance, and Chrome DevTools to test different screen sizes.
